name: fogbugz-mcp
description: Interact with FogBugz issue tracking via LLMs — create, search, update, assign, resolve, and close cases.

tools.name: create_case
tools.description: Creates a new FogBugz case with optional screenshot attachments.

tools.name: update_case
tools.description: Updates an existing FogBugz case with new field values.

tools.name: assign_case
tools.description: Assigns a FogBugz case to a specific user.

tools.name: resolve_case
tools.description: Resolves (marks as fixed/completed) a FogBugz case.

tools.name: reopen_case
tools.description: Reopens a previously closed or resolved FogBugz case.

tools.name: list_my_cases
tools.description: Lists FogBugz cases assigned to a specific user.

tools.name: search_cases
tools.description: Searches for FogBugz cases based on a query string. Supports FogBugz search syntax.

tools.name: get_case_link
tools.description: Gets a direct URL link to a FogBugz case.

tools.name: get_case
tools.description: Gets detailed information about a specific FogBugz case, including events/comments history.

tools.name: list_people
tools.description: Lists all people (users) in FogBugz with their IDs, names, and emails.

tools.name: list_categories
tools.description: Lists all case categories in FogBugz (e.g., Bug, Feature Request, Inquiry).

tools.name: view_project
tools.description: Gets detailed information about a specific FogBugz project.

tools.name: view_area
tools.description: Gets detailed information about a specific FogBugz area.

tools.name: create_project
tools.description: Creates a new project in FogBugz.

tools.name: api_request
tools.description: Makes a generic FogBugz XML API request for advanced queries not covered by other tools.

fogbugzUrl.title: FogBugz URL
fogbugzUrl.description: Base URL of your FogBugz instance (e.g. https://yourcompany.fogbugz.com).

fogbugzApiKey.title: FogBugz API Key
fogbugzApiKey.description: Your personal FogBugz API token. Found under My Settings → API Tokens.
